skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>qqbot-channel</name>
    <description>QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-qqbot/skills/qqbot-channel/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>qqbot-media</name>
    <description>QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-qqbot/skills/qqbot-media/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>qqbot-remind</name>
    <description>QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-qqbot/skills/qqbot-remind/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-bitable</name>
    <description>飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-bitable/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-calendar</name>
    <description>飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-calendar/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-channel-rules</name>
    <description>Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-channel-rules/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-create-doc</name>
    <description>创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-create-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-fetch-doc</name>
    <description>获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-fetch-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-im-read</name>
    <description>飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-im-read/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-task</name>
    <description>飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-task/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-troubleshoot</name>
    <description>飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-troubleshoot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-update-doc</name>
    <description>更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-lark/skills/feishu-update-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>clawflow</name>
    <description>Use when work should span one or more detached tasks but still behave like one job with a single owner context. ClawFlow is the runtime substrate under authoring layers like Lobster, acpx, or plain code. Keep conditional logic in the caller; use ClawFlow for flow identity, waiting, outputs, and user-facing emergence.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/clawflow/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>clawflow-inbox-triage</name>
    <description>Example ClawFlow authoring pattern for inbox triage. Use when messages need different treatment based on intent, with some routes notifying immediately, some waiting on outside answers, and others rolling into a later summary.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/clawflow-inbox-triage/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tmux</name>
    <description>Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/tmux/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>clawsec-suite</name>
    <description>ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/clawsec-suite/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>context-engineering</name>
    <description>AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/context-engineering/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>core-principles</name>
    <description>核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/core-principles/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-global-operations</name>
    <description>飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/feishu-global-operations/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>find-skills</name>
    <description>Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>memory-recall</name>
    <description>基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/memory-recall/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>multi-search-engine</name>
    <description>17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/multi-search-engine/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>opencode-integration</name>
    <description>OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/opencode-integration/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>self-evolution</name>
    <description>自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/self-evolution/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>self-improving</name>
    <description>Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/self-improving/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

## 分析方法总览

### 1. 理论概率计算（数学基准）

**方法**: 组合数学
```
红球组合: C(33,6) = 1,107,568
蓝球组合: C(16,1) = 16
总组合: 1,107,568 × 16 = 17,721,088

一等奖概率 = 1/17,721,088
```

**作用**: 提供概率基准，知道中奖有多难

---

### 2. 频率分析（历史统计）

**方法**: 统计计数
```python
遍历所有历史数据
→ 统计每个号码出现次数
→ 计算实际频率

理论频率: 6/33 ≈ 18.18% (红球)
实际频率: 实际出现次数 / 总期数
```

**作用**: 检验随机性，看实际是否符合理论

---

### 3. 冷热号识别（近期趋势）

**方法**: 时间窗口分析
```python
只看最近20期
→ 统计号码出现次数

热号: 出现 ≥3次 (频率 >15%)
冷号: 出现 ≤1次 (频率 <5%)
```

**作用**: 描述近期现象，不是预测未来

---

## 核心统计原理

### ✅ 科学依据
- **组合数学**: 计算理论概率
- **大数定律**: 长期频率趋于理论概率
- **时间序列**: 分析短期波动

### ⚠️ 关键认知

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, or ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, or ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-controller
resolvedSkills.description: Control and operate Opencode via slash commands. Use this skill to manage sessions, select models, switch agents (plan/build), and coordinate coding through Opencode.

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: acp-router
resolvedSkills.description: Route plain-language requests for Pi, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, or ACP harness work into either OpenClaw ACP runtime sessions or direct acpx-driven sessions ("telephone game" flow). For coding-agent thread requests, read this skill first, then use only `sessions_spawn` for thread creation.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-controller
resolvedSkills.description: Control and operate Opencode via slash commands. Use this skill to manage sessions, select models, switch agents (plan/build), and coordinate coding through Opencode.

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表

(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档

(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-calendar
resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-controller
resolvedSkills.description: Control and operate Opencode via slash commands. Use this skill to manage sessions, select models, switch agents (plan/build), and coordinate coding through Opencode.

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec suite manager with embedded advisory-feed monitoring, cryptographic signature verification, approval-gated malicious-skill response, and guided setup for additional security skills.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-bitable

飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）

(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务

会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>

NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。

resolvedSkills.description: 飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-channel-rules
resolvedSkills.description: Lark/Feishu channel output rules. Always active in Lark conversations.

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-create-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-fetch-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 feishu_doc_media 工具）。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-im-read
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-task
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-troubleshoot
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-update-doc
resolvedSkills.description: 更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-channel
resolvedSkills.description: QQ 频道管理技能。查询频道列表、子频道、成员、发帖、公告、日程等操作。使用 qqbot_channel_api 工具代理 QQ 开放平台 HTTP 接口，自动处理 Token 鉴权。当用户需要查看频道、管理子频道、查询成员、发布帖子/公告/日程时使用此技能。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-remind
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 定时提醒。支持一次性和周期性提醒的创建、查询、取消。当通过 QQ 通道通信且涉及提醒/定时任务时使用。

resolvedSkills.name: qqbot-media
resolvedSkills.description: QQBot 富媒体收发能力。使用 <qqmedia> 标签，系统根据文件扩展名自动识别类型（图片/语音/视频/文件）。

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: tmux
resolvedSkills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: clawsec-suite
resolvedSkills.description: ClawSec 安全套件 - 恶意技能监控、加密签名验证、审批门控响应。全局安全技能。

resolvedSkills.name: context-engineering
resolvedSkills.description: AI Agent 上下文工程技能。当需要管理 AI Agent 的上下文状态、优化 Token 使用、设计多 Agent 协作、处理长周期任务时使用此技能。基于 Anthropic 最佳实践。

resolvedSkills.name: core-principles
resolvedSkills.description: 核心原则技能 - 隐私保护 + 实事求是。全局最高优先级，所有 Session 和 Agent 必须遵守。

resolvedSkills.name: feishu-global-operations
resolvedSkills.description:
飞书全局操作技能（最高优先级）。包含 Token 内存存储机制、云盘操作、文档创建等核心功能。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要操作飞书云盘（创建文件夹/上传下载文件）
(2) 需要创建/编辑/读取飞书云文档
(3) 需要管理飞书日历、任务、多维表格
(4) 用户提到"飞书"、"云盘"、"云文档"、"飞书文档"

**核心原则**: Token 内存存储，用户隔离，Gateway 重启后需重新授权

resolvedSkills.name: find-skills
resolvedSkills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

resolvedSkills.name: memory-recall
resolvedSkills.description: 基于钩子（hooks）的记忆检索系统，允许通过关键词触发快速回忆相关记忆。全局记忆技能。

resolvedSkills.name: multi-search-engine
resolvedSkills.description: 17 个搜索引擎集成，无需 API key 即可进行网络搜索。支持国内 8 个引擎和国际 9 个引擎，内置自动代理访问国外网站。OpenClaw 全局唯一允许的搜索工具。

resolvedSkills.name: opencode-integration
resolvedSkills.description: OpenCode 集成技能。使用 OpenCode 进行代码生成、项目管理和 AI 编码任务。支持 Plan/Build 工作流、会话管理、模型选择。

resolvedSkills.name: self-evolution
resolvedSkills.description: 自我进化技能，用于 AI 助手的持续学习和能力提升。利用外网访问优势，学习最新技术，增强现有能力，创建新技能。全局进化技能。

resolvedSkills.name: self-improving
resolvedSkills.description: Self-Improving + Proactive Agent — Global Skill. 从用户纠正和自我反思中学习，知识随时间累积，桥接原生记忆系统。

resolvedSkills.name: automation-workflow
resolvedSkills.description: 自动化工作流技能，用于创建和管理自动化任务流程。
